nodes.label: Stage File Demo GIF
nodes.description: Animated GIF demonstrating the stage-file drag interaction in the Dragit UI. Shows a file item 'main.tsx' in './src' with a hand cursor hovering over it (indicating draggability), above a 'Staged Changes' panel showing count badge '0' and empty state message 'No files with staged changes found.' Dark-themed Git GUI interface illustrating the core drag-to-stage workflow.
